dashboard.label: DefenseClaw Security Focus
dashboard.description: Prioritized views for high-severity, blocked, denied, and enforcement-oriented activity.

search.query: `defenseclaw_audit_risk` | search risk_bucket="critical" OR risk_bucket="high" OR risk_bucket="medium" | stats count
`defenseclaw_audit_base` | search action="*block*" OR action="*deny*" OR action="*enforce*" OR action="*quarantine*" | stats count
`defenseclaw_audit_base` | search severity=ERROR OR severity=CRITICAL OR action="*fail*" OR action="*error*" | stats count
`defenseclaw_audit_risk` | stats count by risk_bucket | sort - count

`defenseclaw_audit_risk` | search risk_bucket="critical" OR risk_bucket="high" OR risk_bucket="medium" | stats count values(severity) as severity values(target) as target by action | sort - count | head 20
`defenseclaw_audit_risk` | search risk_bucket="critical" OR risk_bucket="high" OR risk_bucket="medium" | table timestamp risk_bucket action severity actor target details | sort - timestamp | head 30
